revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-3-260

A generator that produces electric energy from the energy of wave motion. Usually the wave motion is used to compress a fluid to supply a turbine coupled to an electrical generator.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Wave-actuated generator}}
